source.method: curl the HF LeRobot mirror's meta/tasks.jsonl (one JSON obj per line, {task_index, task}); collected unique non-empty 'task' values

instructions: Press the stapler.
Open the drawer.
Pick up the object under the table and put it on top of the table.
Disassemble the object
Close Water kettle .
Push the cube to the goal location represented using a cross.
Stack cups together.
Pick up the brush and put it on the table.
Pick up the brush and sweep the table.
Close the laptop.
Pick up the object and place it in the box.
Separate the stacked cups..
Pick up the screw driver and place it in the box.
Pick up the object on the table and place it in the cup.
Pick up the banana and place it in the drawer.
Pour the objects in the blue cup to the white cup.
Pick up the level and place it on the cup.
open the box
Close the drawer.
Handover the object on the table to the human.
Pick up the battery and place it in the open drawer.
Pick up the battery.
Pick up the object on the table then put it down.
Disassemble the object.
Pick up the tape and put it in the box.
Pick up the cup and put it on the table.
Pick up the pen and place it in the cup.
Use the stick to swipe the cup.
Pick up the toy duck and put it on the goal location represented using a cross.
Pick up the two cups together then put them down.
Open the drawer and place the battery in the drawer.
Push the cup the goal location represented using a cross.
